citations.quote: VA dealers custody client VAs with SFC-regulated VA custodian service providers
FSTB and SFC conclude consultations on virtual asset dealer and custodian regimes
Regulate Virtual Asset Advisory Service Providers and Virtual Asset Management Service Providers

summary: The Financial Services and the Treasury Bureau and the Securities and Futures Commission published conclusions to their joint public consultation on a licensing regime for virtual asset dealing services, alongside separate conclusions on virtual asset custodian services published the same day. Licensed dealers must generally custody client virtual assets only with SFC-regulated virtual asset custodian service providers. The same day, FSTB and SFC opened a further consultation on new licensing regimes for virtual asset advisory service providers and virtual asset management service providers.
title: Consultation conclusions: licensing regimes for virtual asset dealing and custodian services
why_it_matters: This sets the terms for two new, mandatory licensing regimes that will bring virtual asset dealing and custody businesses under direct Hong Kong regulation for the first time.
